block_01: Imagine a source that may indicate the most important events that could affect the trading market. Well, it actually exists: the economic calendar may provide information on the next moment of possible high volatility and the direction the currency might go.
block_02: This fundamental analysis tool may be especially useful for Forex traders, since it highlights the events and the currency pairs that could potentially be affected due to economic events. Learn to read the economic calendar and find forecasts that may influence your trading preference in just a few clicks.
block_03: Check the full article, if you want to master the economic calendar.
